abilities.name: Killswitch
abilities.description: After subordinate Construct killed, may discard card to detonate it, 2 damage within p2.

abilities.name: My Creation
abilities.description: Accompanied by and may control single non-Swarm Construct of Minion Rank or lower.

actions: (1) Freezing Touch (Sorcery/Intellect) | AV: 6t (12t) | TN: 12t | Rg: y1 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/4 damage, becomes Slow.
(1) Lightning Bolt (Sorcery/Intellect) | AV: 6t (12t) | TN: 12t | Rg: z10 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 1/3/4 damage, ignoring Armor. No randomize on engaged.
(1) Enchant Weapon (Enchanting/Cunning) | AV: 5R (11R) | TN: 11R | Rg: 1 | Resist: Df | Target weapon gains Electric or Ice effect 1 minute.
system.notes: Magical backbone of Arcanist movement. Officially maintain Union constructs. Skilled spellcasters with hidden vaults of Arcanist knowledge.
